data: {"generalSituation":"The easterly airstream now affecting the coast of Guangdong will be replaced by a southerly airstream gradually tomorrow. Under the influence of upper-air disturbances, the weather will be unsettled with showers and thunderstorms over southern China in the next couple of days. With the upper-air disturbances departing and the anticyclone aloft over the northern part of the South China Sea strengthening, showers will ease off gradually over the coast of southern China towards the weekend to early next week. The weather will improve and it will be persistently hot.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260519","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"East force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground at first. Becoming south to southeast force 3 later.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers.
